_README: Custom forms built in /admin.html (Forms tab). Each form is reachable at /form/<slug> and auto-captures + syncs to HubSpot and the Leads dashboard. Field types: text, email, tel, number, textarea, select (provide options). Map field 'name' values in HubSpot settings (fieldMap) to send them to dedicated HubSpot properties.

forms.title: Quick Immigration Enquiry
forms.intro: Tell us a little about yourself and our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
forms.successMessage: Thank you! Our team will contact you shortly.
